_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

wizard/skills/next-phase.md.benefit: The approval drill now uses an example that matches what your system actually does.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.1 -> v0.6.2 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The updated next-phase skill is delivered; your edits to operating-layer files are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Single-skill content fix from v0.6.1: the next-phase skill's Tier-1 approval drill now grounds its demonstrated action in the running phase's actual agents, and falls back to a clearly-hypothetical low-risk demonstration when no agent in the phase performs an irreversible or outbound action. Foundation docs are byte-identical to v0.6.1; no new sections or capabilities.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.1.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.2/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.1.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.0 -> v0.6.2 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). Operating-layer files changed across v0.6.1 and v0.6.2 are merged (your edits kept) or saved for review; the new health-check skill is delivered additively and the next-phase skill is updated.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.0 straight to v0.6.2 (an operator still on v0.6.0 who never took v0.6.1). Delivers the v0.6.0 -> v0.6.1 operating-layer additions (an additive section in operating_discipline.md, the pause-skill change, and the new health-check skill) PLUS the v0.6.2 next-phase approval-drill content fix. Classified minor-additive because the combined delta is dominated by v0.6.1's additive capabilities. Foundation docs are byte-identical to v0.6.0.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.0.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.2/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.0.
